landing.heroHeadline: AI-first organizational rebuilding for the enterprise.
landing.heroLead: Re-Org.AI is not AI added to old processes. It is a zero-based rebuild of processes, roles, and tech stack - designed to make AI scale with governance and measurable ROI.
landing.whatIsReorgDesc: A methodological framework and multi-agent SaaS platform guiding end-to-end AI transformation delivery. Built as a system, not just a toolkit - prioritizing future value over simple automation.
landing.zeroBasedDesc: Not AI layered on existing processes. A ground-up reimagination of workflows, roles, and tech stack using zero-based budgeting logic to justify every process and cost from scratch.
landing.multiTenantDesc: Built for consulting reality: multi-tenant hierarchy (Consultant, Clients, Projects) with strict data isolation and IP reuse across engagements.
landing.antiHallucinationDesc: Financial figures are computed from real data with audit trails - never generated by AI models. Every metric traces back to its source.
landing.howItWorksList1: 7-phase structured workflow: diagnose, rebuild, operating model, tech, business case, governance, adoption
landing.howItWorksList2: Phase gates ensure quality before proceeding
landing.howItWorksList3: 80/20 rule: target 80% automation with 20% human oversight for risk and judgment
landing.consultantsList1: A comprehensive ~170-page implementation playbook with tech recommendations
landing.consultantsList2: Business case with measurable ROI, sensitivity analysis, and full traceability
landing.consultantsList3: Board-ready dashboards, reports, and governance artifacts
landing.methodDesc: A structured workflow from diagnosis through adoption, where each phase builds evidence and reduces risk. No phase proceeds without passing its acceptance gate.
landing.phase0Desc: Create the client workspace, ingest documents, normalize data, and establish the audit trail.
landing.phase0DetailBody: Create the client company and project workspace. Ingest documents at scale (XLSX, CSV, DOCX, PPTX), normalize them into structured bundles, and establish the audit trail that powers every downstream deliverable.
landing.phase1Desc: Build a quantified baseline of the current state and map AI-driven opportunities using zero-based logic.
landing.phase1DetailBody: Build a granular, quantified baseline of the current state. Decompose processes, activities, cost drivers, and KPI performance - with evidence links for every metric. Map AI-driven opportunities using zero-based budgeting logic.
landing.phase2Desc: Redesign processes and roles from scratch, targeting 80% automation with 20% human oversight for judgment areas.
landing.phase2DetailBody: Redesign from zero-based principles. Target 80% automation with 20% human-in-the-loop governance for risk and judgment areas. Convert opportunities into concrete workflows, roles, and backlog items.
landing.phase3Desc: Define the technology stack with sourced constraints, vendor options, and a clear integration plan.
landing.phase3DetailBody: Translate the future-state design into technology architecture. For each capability, evaluate three solution paths: reuse existing stack, add low-friction SaaS, or build custom - with sourced evidence and constraints.
landing.phase4Desc: Build a defensible ROI, NPV, and payback model where every number traces back to real data.
landing.phase4DetailBody: Convert the redesign into a defensible business case with ROI, payback period, and NPV. All numbers are computed from real data with explicit assumptions - never generated by AI models.
landing.phase5Desc: Design an AI-optimized operating model: roles, decision rights, rituals, SLAs, and performance KPIs.
landing.phase5DetailBody: AI changes decision rights, so roles must change. Produce an AI-optimized operating model: organizational structure, RACI, rituals, SLAs/OLAs, and performance management aligned to the future-state workflows.
landing.phase6Desc: Establish AI governance as infrastructure: risk tiers, controls, audit requirements, and retention policies.
landing.phase6DetailBody: Governance as infrastructure, not paperwork. Define risk tiers, control specifications, audit requirements, and operating discipline. Produce policies that are actionable and testable.
landing.phase7Desc: Engineer sustained adoption with wave-based rollouts, stakeholder training, and feedback loops.
landing.phase7DetailBody: Engineer sustained adoption: wave-based rollout, stakeholder mapping, barrier mitigation, training programs, and feedback loops. The goal is lasting change, not a one-off deployment.
landing.agentsDesc: The platform uses a structured extraction pipeline with specialized processing stages - keeping humans in control at every critical decision point.
landing.agentClassifierDesc: document type detection, PII scanning, risk assessment
landing.agentExtractorDesc: structured facts, numeric KPIs, and evidence anchors from XLSX, CSV, DOCX, PPTX
landing.agentNormalizerDesc: data harmonization, deduplication, and bundle assembly
landing.agentReporterDesc: deliverable assembly from approved facts and computed results
landing.precisionDesc: Numbers are computed deterministically with full logging - never generated by language models. Every output is validated and auditable.
landing.precisionList2: Reproducible financial models with full lineage
landing.precisionList3: Evidence coverage gates before any export
landing.tgfDesc1: From oversight to outcomes. TGF is a board-first operating system that connects how the board works (composition, cadence, committees, decisions) to how the enterprise changes (strategy, operating model, controls, culture).
landing.tgfDesc2: Grounded in doctoral research using multi-methods design (survey + interviews + case studies from prominent Brazilian public companies), TGF identifies the competencies and governance practices that operationalize dynamic capabilities for transformation at board level.
landing.tgfPillar1Purpose: Equip the board with digital competence, data fluency, and transformation cadence.
landing.tgfPillar1Outputs: Director skill plans, committee charters, quarterly scorecards, composition heatmaps.
landing.tgfPillar2Purpose: Institutionalize horizon scanning, scenarios, and no-regret strategic moves.
landing.tgfPillar2Outputs: Trend horizon maps, scenario reviews, capital reallocation criteria, funding gates.
landing.tgfPillar3Purpose: Redesign for throughput and value with AI-native processes, roles, and stack.
landing.tgfPillar3Outputs: Zero-based mandates, new accountability roles, board-level SLAs for speed and value.
landing.tgfPillar4Purpose: Build practical, auditable AI governance aligned with LGPD, ISO/IEC 42001, and NIST AI RMF.
landing.tgfPillar4Outputs: AI policy stack, model registry, risk-tiering, human-in-the-loop criteria, assurance dashboards.
landing.tgfPillar5Purpose: Ensure transformation sticks through skills, behaviors, and stakeholder trust.
landing.tgfPillar5Outputs: Adoption KPIs, role-based upskilling programs, Responsible AI narrative.
landing.tgfFlywheelBody: Each pillar feeds the next. BoardOS sets competence and cadence baselines. Signal translates foresight into choices. Rebuild redesigns for value. AITrust hardens controls. CultureShift ensures adoption. Feedback loops back into BoardOS for continuous improvement.
landing.tgfFlywheelResult: The result is a governance system that compounds - not a one-time assessment.
landing.tgfWhyMattersBody: BCG research confirms: 74% of AI initiatives fail to scale, 60% capture no measurable value, and only 5% achieve compound advantage. The root cause is typically the operating model, not model quality.
landing.tgfWhyMattersResult: Fewer than 10% of companies can absorb autonomous agents due to operating model gaps. TGF gives boards the tools to close that gap.
landing.tgfMetricCustomerItems: NPS in AI journeys, strategy pivot speed
landing.tgfMetricProcessItems: Model incidents, audit closures, policy compliance
landing.tgfMetricLearningItems: Digital Competency Score, upskilling %, adoption ratio
landing.founderDesc: Re-Org.AI and TGF are created by Dr. Andiara Petterle - board director, transformation leader, and researcher with 25+ years driving digital disruption and governance excellence.
landing.founderRole: Non-Executive Board Director | Transformation & AI Governance
landing.founderBoardDesc: Independent director at Banco Sicredi/SicrediPar, Trocafone Inc., Dialog CI (AI HRTech), and Docile Alimentos. Former Vice-Chair of the Board and Strategy Committee Chair at Companhia Melhoramentos (MSPA3). Former independent director at Assai Atacadista (ASAI3/NYSE), Knewin LATAM, ANJ, Grupo Cia de Talentos, and Predicta.
landing.founderTrackDesc: Former Executive Vice-President at Grupo RBS, leading a multi-year digital and operational transformation across TV, radio, print, and digital - delivering a financial turnaround and ~19% EBITDA margin in newspaper operations. Co-founder and CEO of Grupo Bolsa de Mulher, one of Latin America's largest women-focused digital media groups (later acquired by Vix/Univision).
landing.founderAcademicDesc: Ph.D./DBA in Business Administration (Business School Lausanne) with research on board effectiveness and directors' digital acumen in the age of AI - the intellectual foundation for the Transformational Governance Framework. Executive education at Stanford, UC Berkeley, Oxford, Harvard, Brown, and PUC-Rio.
landing.founderCred4: IBGC Professor: AI & Digital Transformation for Board Members
landing.founderResearchQuote: "There is no credible long-term corporate strategy without digital transformation - and no credible digital transformation without board digital acumen."
landing.founderResearchMethod: Multi-methods study: 65 survey responses, 9 elite interviews, 70+ governance documents from prominent Brazilian public companies.
landing.dashboardsDesc: Your deliverables should be better than slide decks. Re-Org.AI generates executive dashboards and board-ready reports, with versioning, change tracking, multiple export formats (HTML, Markdown, JSON), and evidence links on every metric.
landing.dashboardReportBuilderDesc: Assemble the final playbook from phase artifacts, lock versions, and export securely.
landing.dashboardVersioningDesc: Full artifact timeline with change tracking. Gate decisions recorded with rationale.
landing.dashboardEvidenceDesc: Click any number to see its source - the specific document, cell, or paragraph it came from.
landing.dashboardBoardReadyDesc: AI generates prose only from approved facts and computed models. No invented numbers, no hallucinated claims.
landing.dashboardFinancialModelsDesc: Include sensitivity analysis and assumption registers, with every input traceable to its source.
landing.dashboardRepeatableDesc: Standardized delivery rhythm reduces reinvention, increases margin, and supports multiple packaging tiers.
landing.securityDesc: Clients trust consultants with sensitive operational and financial data. Re-Org.AI is built to meet that bar: strict isolation, least-privilege access, and end-to-end auditability.
landing.securityIsolationDesc: Every query is scoped. Data is isolated across consulting firms and their client companies by design.
landing.securityDataProtectionDesc: Documents flagged as high-risk are blocked until reviewed and sanitized. Redaction is enforced for all evidence snippets.
landing.securityAuditTrailDesc: Uploads, sanitization, approvals, gate decisions, and exports are logged with timestamps and actors.
landing.securityPackList2: Subprocessor list and data flow diagrams
landing.pricingDesc: Standardized delivery reduces reinvention and increases margin. Offer clients clear packaging tiers that scale from rapid diagnostics to full enterprise transformation programs.
landing.pricingDiagnosticDesc: Phases 0-1: ingest client data, build a quantified baseline, map opportunities, and deliver an executive dashboard. Best for rapid clarity.
landing.pricingRebuildDesc: Phases 0-4: full future-state redesign, technology architecture, and a defensible business case with financial model.
landing.pricingEnterpriseDesc: Phases 0-7: complete program including governance, operating model, adoption, and a board-ready playbook.
landing.faqDesc: Quick answers for security, delivery, and executive stakeholders.
landing.faqQ1: How do you prevent AI-generated numbers?
landing.faqA1: All financial figures and metrics are computed from real, traceable data inputs - never generated by language models. The AI writes narrative text only from approved facts and computed results, ensuring every number is defensible.
landing.faqQ2: What happens to our client documents?
landing.faqA2: Documents are normalized into structured bundles (text, tables, anchors) and stored encrypted per tenant. We do not store raw full-text in the database. Each tenant's data is strictly isolated.
landing.faqA3: We take a fail-closed approach: documents flagged as high or unknown risk are blocked until reviewed and sanitized. All evidence snippets are redacted on demand, and every action is recorded in the audit log.
landing.faqQ4: Can we use our own AI provider?
landing.faqA4: The platform architecture is provider-agnostic and LLM-ready. Current extraction uses deterministic heuristics for reliability. When AI providers are connected, high-stakes outputs are validated against schemas and gated by evidence coverage before they can be exported or shared.
landing.faqQ5: How quickly can we deliver a first diagnostic?
landing.faqA5: With representative client data, a Phase 0-1 diagnostic sprint produces a baseline dashboard and opportunity map in days, not weeks - because ingestion, mapping, and report assembly are standardized and repeatable.
landing.faqQ6: What is the Transformational Governance Framework?
landing.faqA6: TGF is a research-backed, board-first operating system grounded in Dr. Andiara Petterle's doctoral research. It connects how the board works (composition, cadence, committees) to how the enterprise changes (strategy, operating model, controls, culture) through five actionable pillars.
landing.demoDesc: See the complete workflow: from document ingestion to evidence-linked dashboards and exported reports.
landing.demoList1: End-to-end consultant workflow with full audit trail
landing.demoList2: Evidence Drawer on dashboards and financial models
landing.demoList3: Phase gates, approvals, and versioned artifacts
landing.demoList4: Report Builder with multiple export formats
landing.demoUseCase: Tell us about your use case
landing.pilotDesc: Create a secure workspace, upload representative client data, and generate a Phase 1 baseline dashboard and executive narrative with full evidence links. Invite-only.
landing.pilotCrit1: Client data normalized into structured bundles with full lineage
landing.pilotCrit2: Evidence coverage above 90% for the baseline dashboard
landing.pilotCrit3: Business case model for at least one high-impact lever
landing.pilotCrit4: Exported report reviewed and approved by stakeholders
landing.pilotReadyDesc: We'll align on data sensitivity, deployment constraints, and scope (Diagnostic vs. Transformation) before provisioning your workspace.

seo.title: Re-Org.AI - AI-First Reorganization Platform
seo.description: Re-Org.AI is an AI-first reorganization platform for consulting firms. Ingest enterprise data, run a 7-phase gated methodology, and deliver board-ready playbooks with auditable traceability.
seo.ogDescription: Not AI added to old processes. A zero-based rebuild of processes, roles, and tech stack - with governance and measurable ROI.
